title: Reconcile Zephyr target inventory
description: Resolve stale board fragments/selectors and complete physical or infrastructure-dependent target validation exposed by the boot audit. Keep canonical HWMv2 target names and distinguish build support, faithful simulation, and physical proof.
acceptance_criteria: Every declared target has a canonical Zephyr mapping or approved retirement; active commands use valid selectors; every hardware-only/native32 row has retained independent evidence and cleanup.
